sibling_studies.name: fusion
sibling_studies.relationship: parallel — separate task (POI-category classification), separate baselines (HAVANA/PGC/POI-RGNN), separate state machine. Shared codebase + infrastructure.

revision_notes: 1.1 (2026-04-15): study re-scoped to standalone next-POI + next-region. CH01 rewritten as MTL-lift (no HGI comparison). Added CH04 simple-baseline floor, CH06 OOD-restricted Acc@K, CH14 shortcut audit, CH15 transductive-leakage audit. Removed HGI cross-engine runs from P1. Multi-seed (n=15) default for CH01/CH02/CH03 headlines. val_joint_geom_lift replaces arithmetic val_joint_lift as the check2HGI monitor (fix: review-agent finding #2.1).

p0_1_integrity_al.description: PI.1–PI.7 preflight integrity checks on Check2HGI Alabama artefacts.
p0_1_integrity_al.notes: Run before any training. See coordinator/integrity_checks.md.

p0_1_integrity_fl.description: PI.1–PI.7 preflight integrity checks on Check2HGI Florida artefacts.
p0_1_integrity_fl.notes: FL is ~4× AL's size; verify no NaN/Inf/shape mismatches.

p0_2_label_roundtrip_al.description: 20-sample hand-verified round-trip of poi_idx → idx_to_placeid → raw checkin stream, for both next_poi and next_region labels. Catches indexing bugs PI.3 (range-only) misses.

p0_3_code_deltas_next_poi_loader.description: Code delta: next_poi loader + IoPaths + CHECK2HGI_NEXT_POI_REGION preset + pipeline + FoldCreator branch + train.py task_a.num_classes resolution + extend evaluate_model with OOD-restricted Acc@K + unit tests.
p0_3_code_deltas_next_poi_loader.notes: ~2-3h. Tracked as P1 prerequisite. See phases/P0_preparation.md §P0.3.

p0_4_smoke_al.description: End-to-end CLI smoke with check2hgi_next_poi_region preset on Alabama, 1 fold, 2 epochs.
p0_4_smoke_al.notes: Exit 0 required; val_joint_geom_lift + per-head val_accuracy_* must all be in metrics dict.

p0_5_simple_baselines_al.description: Compute simple baselines on AL: random, majority-class, 1-step Markov, top-K popular, user-history top-K for both next_poi and next_region tasks. Writes the 'known-good reference' floor.
p0_5_simple_baselines_al.notes: User implementing on a separate branch. See phases/P0_preparation.md §P0.5 for spec.

p0_6_shortcut_audit_al.description: Two-step shortcut audit: (a) code inspection of check2HGI preprocessing for fclass / category / POI-identity shortcut channels; (b) unconditional fclass-shuffle ablation on AL single-task next-POI, 1 fold 10 epochs. Compare Acc@10 drop.
p0_6_shortcut_audit_al.notes: Unconditional per review-agent #2.3. Even if code inspection shows no shortcut, run the shuffle to catch what inspection misses.

p0_7_leakage_audit_al.description: Transductive-leakage audit: retrain Check2HGI on AL with one val fold's users held out; compare next-POI Acc@10 on that fold vs the standard-trained embeddings.
p0_7_leakage_audit_al.notes: Run once as an upper bound. ~30min total.
